title: calview
description: Class schedule visualizer with smart route planning across campus.

title: deltabet
description: Real-time odds aggregator. Fetches and normalizes betting odds from multiple sportsbooks, providing users with up-to-date information for informed betting decisions.

title: WahooWheels
description: Student carpooling platform with Mapbox routing and JWT auth. Deployed on AWS (EC2, S3, RDS).

title: Course Review App
description: JavaFX CRUD app with MVC architecture. Features course reviews, ratings, and user authentication. Data stored in SQLite.

title: classmate
description: An intelligent retrieval and reasoning system that extracts course content, indexes it semantically, and answers student queries using multi-tool reasoning with explainable traces.

title: random surfaces
description: Random Surfaces shuffles grid paths with tiny flips to create perfectly random 3D shapes.

title: LyricLab
description: Platform to choose your favorite songs, remix their lyrics to your liking, and start a virtual party room to start singing with friends!
